---
ID: SLD-FE-430
Title: Activity Filter Presets and Saved Views
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As an admin reviewer
I want reusable activity filter presets
So routine compliance reviews do not require rebuilding the same query each session

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Activity UI supports save, rename, apply, and delete preset filters.
- [ ] Presets include action/outcome/entity/date/search criteria and page-size preference.
- [ ] Preset scope supports at least personal and shared-with-admins visibility modes.
- [ ] CSV export can run from an applied preset without manual reconfiguration.
- [ ] Empty-state guidance includes preset-aware remediation paths.
